name: Guru
description: Guru knowledge management platform for teams

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Guru as admin
2. Settings → Integrations → Guru API
3. Copy your User Token
4. Enter your email and token below

credentialFields.label: User Token
credentialFields.helpText: Guru → Settings → Integrations → Guru API → User Token

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Guru team members to verify knowledge base access
